title: The New York Times: Have a Canadian Great-Great Grandparent? It Could Make You Canadian. | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## The New York Times: Have a Canadian Great-Great Grandparent? It Could Make You Canadian.
Fragomen in Toronto, Canada, Canada

- Fragomen in Toronto, Canada
Canada’s new citizenship by descent framework is attracting worldwide attention from individuals exploring ancestral connections to Canada. In an article published in The New York Times , Partner Rick Lamanna observes that the policy could extend Canadian citizenship to potentially millions of people globally with only distant familial ties. This has also led to growing demand for archival documentation as applicants work to establish qualifying lineage.
